description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a slightly flattened dome shape and a golden-brown crust. The surface displays irregular, natural flour dusting and a few darker, baked patches, suggesting artisanal baking methods. The crust appears thick and firm, with some subtle scoring marks and uneven coloration, giving it a handmade appearance. The loaf is unsliced, and its overall form is compact and dense, typical of country or sourdough bread. There are no visible seeds or toppings, and the bread's texture looks hearty and robust. The object is free of any packaging, branding, or labeling.
description: A round, rustic loaf of unsliced bread with a golden-brown, thick crust and natural flour dusting. The surface features irregular baked patches and subtle scoring.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen from the side, showing its rounded, slightly flattened profile and a patchy, golden-brown crust with some darker baked spots.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back or side of the loaf, where the crust appears smoother and lighter, with a visible scoring line and less pronounced flour dusting.
description_view_2: The front or opposite side of the loaf is visible, showing a more uniform, golden-brown crust with a central darker patch and minimal surface markings.
description_view_3: The loaf is viewed from a rear angle, emphasizing the elongated, oval shape and a smoother, lighter crust with a visible scoring line.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, uneven pattern with subtle scoring lines and irregular, darker baked patches. There is a light dusting of flour and no visible seeds or toppings.
